title: Survival Not Guaranteed
description: Dive into an expansive Minecraft modpack that blends challenging survival mechanics like temperature and thirst with extensive exploration of overhauled dungeons and new biomes, all while offering dynamic combat, magical mastery, and complex automation.
body:
Welcome to a world where danger doesn’t wait for you to gear up — it’s already here.
This fantasy RPG modpack blends unforgiving survival mechanics with epic magic, deadly monsters, and vast, dungeon-filled landscapes.

Face searing heat and bitter cold, manage thirst with purifiable water sources, and prepare for combat that demands precision and caution. With every step, you'll be tested — not just by beasts and bosses, but by the world itself.
